snippet.title: A Masonic Bible? Are you ready to see the truth? #mastermason #bible #freemasonry 👀🤫
snippet.description:
Are you ready to take a look inside a REAL Master Mason's Bible?  

IMPORTANT: This is a SHORT so yes, there are pages that got skipped over.  Those pages are simply a Masonic family tree, and some various Bible study guides. The SCRIPTURE inside is the King James Version, and is unedited from the original KJV text.  This particular book DOES NOT have Egyptian Gods at the back.  Some versions DO have that, but they are there not for worship, but as part of the study guides that compare ancient religions and symbols to modern ones in much the same way that a college course might study the same things.  It is to help us better understand the history of the Holy Land, not a call to worship "old gods". 

You can watch the FULL PAGE by PAGE video here: https://youtu.be/sWWu6hmalIc

You can purchase this exact Bible here: https://masonicbibles.com/collections/products/products/master-mason-edition

Threatening messages will be reported and your account maybe suspended.

If you think Masons worship Lucifer, you are another foolish victim of the Taxil Hoax.  Learn the truth HERE: https://youtu.be/6KnYLbYofZ8

Brother Masons, make sure you comment.  😛😝

snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: Age 14 and hearing for first time with cochlear implants 😭 #shorts
snippet.description:
💙 Subscribe to Happily for more feel-good videos: https://bit.ly/2yLeLS1
🔔 Turn on all notifications so you don’t miss an upload

This is the emotional moment a teen with irreversible hearing loss that she shares with her mom has her cochlear implants activated for the very first time. Katelynn Bronson, from Provo, Utah, shares a hereditary hearing loss, passed down through her mom, Jennifer. Jennifer, 38, started losing her hearing in her 20s, and after Katelynn, now 14, was born her family were worried she would start losing her hearing, too. Having passed her hearing test at birth, Katelynn began to show signs of the same condition as her mom after her first birthday, and she received her hearing aids when she turned four. Katelynn learned to read lips, but in school it was clear her hearing was getting worse, Jennifer said, so her family started looking into cochlear implants.

📰 Read the full story here: https://happilynews.com/teen-with-irreversible-hearing-loss-has-cochlear-implants-turned-on-and-the-result-is-magical/

----

snippet.title: Who is Graham Norton’s Least Favorite Guest? | WWHL
snippet.description:
Celebrated talk show host Graham Norton names Harvey Weinstein as the worst guest to have graced his iconic stage on the set of The Graham Norton Show. Amidst the candid chat, Graham opens up about his issues with the infamous Hollywood producer, who appeared on his talk show in 2015 alongside Jessie J, David Tennant, and Olivia Colman.

►► Subscribe To WWHL: http://bravo.ly/WWHLSub

Watch WWHL Sunday-Thursday:
WWHL Website: http://www.bravotv.com/watch-what-happens-live
Follow WWHL: https://twitter.com/BravoWWHL
Like WWHL: https://www.facebook.com/WatchWhatHappensLive
WWHL Tumblr: http://bravowwhl.tumblr.com/

'Watch What Happens: Live' is Bravo's late-night, interactive talk show that features guests from the world of entertainment, politics, and pop culture. Hosted by Andy Cohen, the series includes lively debates on everything from fashion, the latest on everyone's favorite Bravolebrities, and what celebrity is making headlines that week. Past guests who have joined Cohen in the Bravo Clubhouse include Sarah Jessica Parker, Tina Fey, Khloe Kardashian, Jennifer Lopez, Liam Neeson, Kelly Ripa, Jimmy Fallon, Anderson Cooper, Jennifer Lawrence, and Lance Bass.
